author: Mandar Wagh
name: Baseline (dim=512, 9 layers) + Tuned Hyperparameters
blurb: Baseline architecture with tuned hyperparameters: matrix_lr=0.06 (was 0.04), scalar_lr=0.06 (was 0.04), tied_embed_lr=0.08 (was 0.05), warmdown=1500 (was 1200). Higher LRs for faster convergence while keeping fast baseline architecture (~43ms/step).
key_innovations: Baseline architecture: dim=512, 9 layers for fast training (~43ms/step)
